name: 86 Chaos 15.0.69 Firebase Credential Project Selection Hotfix
label: 86 Chaos 15.0.69
notes: 15.0.69 hotfix: server routes now choose the Firebase project embedded inside FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY before stale FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID/REACT_APP values, so testing deployments can use chaos-test-d1601 without a separate production key.
